title: campanula cochleariifolia subsp. reflexa
intro: Campanula cochleariifolia subsp. reflexa, also known as the bellflower, is a plant species within the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Campanula cochleariifolia subsp. reflexa include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used externally for wounds and skin irritations, or internally for its medicinal properties.
